mapper.select: SELECT id, parent_id AS parentId, type, name, path, component, icon, perms, sort, visible, status FROM sys_menu WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort, id

SELECT DISTINCT m.id, m.parent_id AS parentId, m.type, m.name, m.path, m.component, m.icon, m.perms, m.sort, m.visible, m.status FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON rm.menu_id = m.id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.role_id = rm.role_id INNER JOIN sys_role r ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.deleted = 0 AND r.status = 1 AND m.deleted = 0 AND m.status = 1 AND m.visible = 1 AND m.type IN ('DIR', 'MENU') ORDER BY m.sort, m.id
